extract: Furfrou (Japanese: トリミアン Trimmien) is a Normal-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Furfrou can have its hair trimmed into nine different styles, changing its appearance from its Natural Form into one of the following trims, each named after the style its fur is trimmed and dyed in: Heart Trim, Star Trim, Diamond Trim, Debutante Trim, Matron Trim, Dandy Trim, La Reine Trim, Kabuki Trim, and Pharaoh Trim. Furfrou will revert back to its Natural Form if five days have passed since it was trimmed. Other circumstances may also cause it to revert. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Form data for these details.)
